children.label: A
children.text: consistent with the purposes of this Act, title LXII of the Revised Statutes of the United States, and other Federal law applicable to national banks; and

children.label: B
children.text: appropriate to avoid any significant risk to the safety and soundness of insured depository institutions or the Deposit Insurance Fund or other adverse effects, such as undue concentration of resources, decreased or unfair competition, conflicts of interests, or unsound banking practices.

children.label: A
children.text: review all restrictions or requirements established pursuant to paragraph (1) to determine whether there is a continuing need for any such restriction or requirement to carry out the purposes of the Act, including the avoidance of any adverse effect referred to in paragraph (1)(B); and

children.label: B
children.text: modify or eliminate any such restriction or requirement the Comptroller finds is no longer required for such purposes.

children.heading: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
children.label: b Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
A
children.text: between a depository institution subsidiary of a bank holding company and any affiliate of such depository institution (other than a subsidiary of such institution); or

children.label: B
children.text: between a State member bank and a subsidiary of such bank;

children.label: A
children.text: consistent with the purposes of this Act, the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956 [ et seq.], the Federal Reserve Act [ et seq.], and other Federal law applicable to depository institution subsidiaries of bank holding companies or State member banks, as the case may be; and12 U.S.C. 184112 U.S.C. 221

children.label: B
children.text: appropriate to prevent an evasion of any provision of law referred to in subparagraph (A) or to avoid any significant risk to the safety and soundness of depository institutions or the Deposit Insurance Fund or other adverse effects, such as undue concentration of resources, decreased or unfair competition, conflicts of interests, or unsound banking practices.

children.label: A
children.text: review all restrictions or requirements established pursuant to paragraph (1) or (4) to determine whether there is a continuing need for any such restriction or requirement to carry out the purposes of the Act, including the avoidance of any adverse effect referred to in paragraph (2)(B) or (4)(B); and

children.label: B
children.text: modify or eliminate any such restriction or requirement the Board finds is no longer required for such purposes.

children.label: A
children.text: consistent with the purposes of this Act, the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956, the Federal Reserve Act, and other Federal law applicable to foreign banks and their affiliates in the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: appropriate to prevent an evasion of any provision of law referred to in subparagraph (A) or to avoid any significant risk to the safety and soundness of depository institutions or the Deposit Insurance Fund or other adverse effects, such as undue concentration of resources, decreased or unfair competition, conflicts of interests, or unsound banking practices.

children.label: A
children.text: consistent with the purposes of this Act, the Federal Deposit Insurance Act [ et seq.], or other Federal law applicable to State nonmember banks; and12 U.S.C. 1811

children.label: B
children.text: appropriate to avoid any significant risk to the safety and soundness of depository institutions or the Deposit Insurance Fund or other adverse effects, such as undue concentration of resources, decreased or unfair competition, conflicts of interests, or unsound banking practices.

children.label: A
children.text: review all restrictions or requirements established pursuant to paragraph (1) to determine whether there is a continuing need for any such restriction or requirement to carry out the purposes of the Act, including the avoidance of any adverse effect referred to in paragraph (1)(B); and

children.label: B
children.text: modify or eliminate any such restriction or requirement the Corporation finds is no longer required for such purposes.
